docket_entries.description: PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNISHIPPERS ASSOCIATION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNISHIPPERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPHER CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
